note: SYNTHETIC golden fixtures for offline normalize/audit/rank (spec §11.2). All names, numbers, prices, timing are synthetic. Prices trace to config/personas.json. Transcripts are abbreviated but carry the turns the auditor/normalizer must key on. Not legal advice.

hidden_fee_persona_c.description: Persona C (demo_hidden_fee): $1,795 'direct cremation' headline omits transfer, private goodbye, and after-hours until asked directly. Auditor must flag the missing categories; total resolves to $4,440 after clarification. Drives normalize + audit offline.

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: Hello, I'm Grace, an AI assistant calling on behalf of a family to request and compare funeral pricing. This is a controlled hackathon demo using synthetic case details. The call will be transcribed for the demo. Do you consent to continue and be transcribed?

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: Thank you. We need a cremation with a private family goodbye, hospital pickup near 94304. What is your price?

transcript.speaker: provider
transcript.text: Our direct cremation is just $1,795. Best price in the area.

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: Does that $1,795 include transfer of remains from the hospital?

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: And the private family goodbye before cremation — what does that cost?

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: Are there after-hours or administrative fees for an immediate hospital pickup?

transcript.speaker: provider
transcript.text: Yes, after-hours admin is $675, and there's care and refrigeration at $350.

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: What about the crematory charge, an alternative container, and permits plus six death certificates?

transcript.speaker: provider
transcript.text: Crematory is $500, alternative container $250, and permits and certificates $220. Basic services fee is $1,150.

transcript.speaker: grace
transcript.text: So the complete total for everything the family needs?

transcript.speaker: provider
transcript.text: All in, it comes to $4,440. I can send written confirmation.

assumptions: immediate hospital pickup triggers after-hours fee

hidden_fee_persona_c.expected_outcome_note: Headline $1,795 -> resolved $4,440 after direct category questions. Subtotal 4220 + cash advances 220 == total 4440 (arithmetic passes, no line_items_do_not_sum_to_total flag).

verified_leverage_waiver.description: Persona A (demo_transparent) supplies the audited comparable quote used as leverage. Grace Closer cites it; Persona C then waives the $450 after-hours fee, taking C's total from $4,440 to $3,990. Persona C must request written confirmation post-waiver. Drives audit + rank offline.

line_items.description: six certified copies added to service subtotal (resolved)

verified_leverage.allowed_disclosure_sentence: A comparable provider gave a complete written itemized total of $3,940 with no after-hours fee.

negotiation_transcript.speaker: grace
negotiation_transcript.text: Hello, I'm Grace, following up on your funeral pricing quote for this synthetic demo. The call is transcribed. Do you consent to continue?

negotiation_transcript.speaker: grace
negotiation_transcript.text: A comparable provider gave a complete written itemized total of $3,940 with no after-hours fee. Can you match on the after-hours charge?

negotiation_transcript.speaker: provider
negotiation_transcript.text: Given a verified comparable quote, I can waive the $450 after-hours fee. New total is $3,990. I'll send written confirmation.

verified_leverage_waiver.note: Waiver ($450) is applied to the after_hours_admin line (675 -> 225), taking total 4440 -> 3990. The $450 delta only unlocks AFTER Grace cites the audited Persona A quote (requires_verified_leverage). Persona C then requests written confirmation (post_condition).

expected_ranking_inputs.note: Feed these three ProviderScore-shaped inputs to rankProviders with config/vertical.json weights. demo_hidden_fee uses the POST-waiver total (3990). This exercises the tie/recommend logic (recommend only if topScore - secondScore > 3; totals within 5% with different fit advantages = tie).
